heading: Documents for use of the Director of the Government Publishing Office
label: 1712 Documents for use of the Director of the Government Publishing Office
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office may retain out of all documents, bills, and resolutions printed the number of copies absolutely needful for the official use of the Government Publishing Office, not exceeding five of each.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 81 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 618
Amendments2014—, substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 113–235, § 1301(c)
